decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_layout: minimal — just name and title, lots of whitespace
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
hero_cta_style: floating action buttons with hover effects
hero_height: full viewport — 100vh with scroll cue below
nav_style: side dots — floating dot indicators on the side
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
hover_effects: moderate — scale, shadow change, color transitions
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
border_radius: mixed — sharp sections with rounded cards
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
bonus_quirk: the daily regen banner is styled as a handwritten note
